label.voice.ai.prompt.error: The user spoke: {transcript}. No match found. Politely explain and suggest options like {options} in {lang}.
label.about.profession.desc: Having 9 years of progressive accomplishments in the field of UI development facing needs in the Website, Application Development where my skills can be utilized for the end user with better User Experience.
